questions.question: Explain the key difference between inductive learning and analytical learning, and provide an example of each approach in the context of Machine Learning II.
questions.hint: Provide a clear and concise explanation

questions.question: A sequential covering algorithm is an example of an inductive learning approach. Describe how this type of algorithm works, including the steps involved in the learning process.
questions.hint: Focus on the algorithm's steps and learning process

questions.question: A rule set learned using an example-based method is a representation of the training data. Explain the concept of 'sequential covering' and provide an example of how it can be used in a rule set learning algorithm.
